exercises.title: DIGIT REDACT
exercises.brief: Black out every digit in the feed.
promptLines: Define **maskDigits(s)** returning `s` with **every digit** replaced by a `'#'`. Non-digits are untouched.
exercises.hint: s.replace(/\\d/g, '#') — the g flag hits every digit.
exercises.lore: Scrub the IDs before the trace locks on.

exercises.title: HASHTAG GATE
promptLines: Define **isTag(s)** returning `true` only when `s` is a `#` followed by **one or more** lowercase letters or digits — and nothing else.

tests.name: valid tags
tests.code: assert(isTag('#neo7') === true && isTag('#abc') === true && isTag('#0') === true);

exercises.hint: /^#[a-z0-9]+$/.test(s) — ^ and $ pin both ends, + means one-or-more.
exercises.lore: Only the lowercase sigils open the channel.

exercises.title: VOWEL COUNTER
promptLines: Define **countVowels(s)** returning how many vowels (`a e i o u`, **case-insensitive**) are in `s`.
starterLines: // TODO: match all vowels (case-insensitive) and count them
exercises.hint: (s.match(/[aeiou]/gi) || []).length — guard the null when there are none.
exercises.lore: Strip the consonants; count what sings.

exercises.title: WHITESPACE CRUSH
exercises.brief: Squeeze runs of whitespace into single gaps.
promptLines: Define **collapseSpaces(s)** that replaces every run of whitespace with a single space `' '`, then trims the ends.
A blank or whitespace-only string returns `''`.
collapseSpaces('  hack   the  planet ')  // 'hack the planet'
starterLines: // TODO: collapse whitespace runs to one space, then trim

tests.name: collapses runs
tests.code: assertEqual(collapseSpaces('  hack   the  planet '), 'hack the planet');

exercises.lore: Compress the dead air; keep the signal tight.

exercises.title: NUMBER HARVEST
exercises.brief: Pull every number out of the noise.
promptLines: Define **extractNumbers(s)** returning an array of all runs of digits as **numbers**, in order. No digits → empty array.
starterLines: // TODO: match all digit runs, convert to numbers
exercises.hint: s.match(/\\d+/g) returns matches or null; map(Number).
